Appearances:
Plaintiff Swords to Plowshares, is present. Represented by Howard Brandon.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Marc Eymard, is present.
Attorney, Rebecca Rudzianis, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAR-15-2010 is vacated.
